subcodes.first_line: Praise be to God Who hath created all beings that they might know Him and attain unto that which He hath ordained for them through His bounty. When He made them manifest [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: الحمد لله الذی خلق الخلق لعرفانه و البلوغ الی ما قدر لهم بجوده فلما اظهرهم
subcodes.subjects: @Muhammad; Islam, @praise and encouragement, @acknowledgment of gift; of monetary contribution, @transcendence; unknowability of God, @purpose; goal of creation, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God
